output.summary: Fixed FQA-011: Removed doubled '-heading' suffix from aria-labelledby value in GalleryCarousel.php. The function theme_block_region_id() already returns '{blockId}-heading', so appending another '-heading' produced '{blockId}-heading-heading' which did not match the actual heading element ID. TSX was verified -- it uses a different ID scheme (clientId + '-heading') which is correct for the editor context.

changes: Line 38: Changed `theme_block_region_id() . '-heading'` to `theme_block_region_id()` in the aria-labelledby attribute value. theme_block_region_id() already returns '{blockId}-heading' (see inc/helpers/blocks.php line 106), so the previous code produced '{blockId}-heading-heading' which did not match the heading element's id attribute (set by ThemeHeading.php line 69 as theme_block_region_id()).

filesVerified.notes: TSX uses `${clientId}-heading` for aria-labelledby. The ThemeHeading TSX component does not output an id on the heading AdvancedRichText element, so this reference does not resolve in the editor. This is acceptable for the block editor context -- the aria association is only critical on the frontend (PHP). No change needed.
Line 104-108: theme_block_region_id() returns $takt_current_block_id . '-heading'. This is the authoritative source of the heading ID used by ThemeHeading.php line 69.
Line 69: Heading element gets id=theme_block_region_id(), confirming the ID is '{blockId}-heading'.

issuesAddressed.description: aria-labelledby value had doubled '-heading' suffix producing '{blockId}-heading-heading' which did not match the heading element's id of '{blockId}-heading'
issuesAddressed.resolution: Removed the extra . '-heading' concatenation from the aria-labelledby attribute in GalleryCarousel.php line 38. Now uses theme_block_region_id() directly which returns the correct '{blockId}-heading' value.
